systems.name: Contentful
systems.description: Enterprise-grade headless CMS with a rich content editor and a powerful API for any platform.

systems.name: DatoCMS
systems.description: Headless CMS for static site generators with a GraphQL API and media management.

systems.name: Forestry
systems.description: Git-based CMS for Jekyll and Hugo sites. Host anywhere and access your CMS from /admin/.

systems.name: Grav
systems.description: Modern, fast flat-file CMS built on PHP. No database required.

systems.name: Hokus CMS
systems.description: Open source desktop CMS for Hugo static websites.

systems.name: Hygraph
systems.description: Headless CMS for digital creators with GraphQL content APIs.

systems.name: Jekyll Admin
systems.description: A Jekyll plugin providing a traditional CMS-style graphical interface to author content.

systems.name: Netlify CMS
systems.description: Open source git-based CMS for static site generators. Works with any static site generator.

systems.name: Prose
systems.description: Open source content editor for GitHub Pages. Simple interface for editing Markdown content.

systems.name: Sanity.io
systems.description: Structured content platform with a React-based editing environment and a real-time content API.

systems.name: Siteleaf
systems.description: Online content manager for Jekyll sites. Publish anywhere including GitHub Pages.

systems.name: Surreal CMS
systems.description: Hosted CMS for static sites over FTP or Amazon S3. Edit HTML pages in-browser.
